message:
chore: Fix clippy warnings and formatting in defer and config commands

defer.rs:
- Reorder imports alphabetically (IdResolver, ResolverConfig before find_matching_ids)
- Fix rustdoc formatting: use backticks around DateTime in doc comment
- Improve line breaking for chained method calls on Local.from_local_datetime()
- Extract error message formatting into proper multi-line blocks
- Reorder test imports to match module conventions (chrono::Datelike after super)

config.rs:
- Replace `Default::default()` with explicit `serde_yaml::Mapping::default()`
  to satisfy clippy::default_trait_access lint when creating YAML mappings
- Apply fix consistently across all three locations where empty mappings
  are created during config value setting

These changes improve code readability and comply with the project's
strict clippy::pedantic and clippy::nursery lint requirements.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
